protocol: article_cpu, 10 epochs, lr 0.001/0.0005, negative_ratio 16, Weighted BCE
interpretation: Best pooled quality; Mesh-T slightly higher pooled Jaccard, but paired CI crosses zero.

protocol: article_cpu, 10 epochs, lr 0.001/0.0005, negative_ratio 16, Weighted BCE, full SOR/SOT/SPEC
interpretation: Best pooled trainable Full Lineage quality; SF paired CI positive, Jaccard CI still touches zero.

protocol: device-aware run before encoder/pair batching and hard negatives
interpretation: Validated MPS execution, but small unbatched dispatches hurt runtime and Mesh-T quality.

protocol: encoder_batch 64, inference_batch 4096, structural hard negatives, negative_ratio 16
interpretation: Batching and hard negatives improved neural efficiency and produced positive paired Mesh-T deltas, but pooled Jaccard stayed below CPU baseline.

protocol: encoder_batch 64, inference_batch 4096, structural_plus_llm_manifest, 898 Codex/GPT-5 hard negatives
interpretation: LLM manifest improved provenance and kept Mesh-T advantage positive; it did not beat the CPU pooled-quality row.

protocol: encoder_batch 64, inference_batch 4096, structural hard negatives, negative_ratio 16, full SOR/SOT/SPEC
interpretation: Largest efficiency gain; precision/Jaccard worsened because broad Full Lineage negatives remain too plausible.
